body:
@sepo-agent /answer

Can you check --

- Is the code working?  
- or should we add a flag

comments.body:
I checked it again: the collapse path is already implemented and covered by tests, so this is not a “missing flag” case.

- Old review syntheses are collapsed before posting a new one in [`post-comment.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/post-comment.ts).
- There is already a toggle: `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` (default behavior is enabled) in [`agent-review.yml`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.github/workflows/agent-review.yml).
- The targeted test for this logic (`collapsePreviousReviewSummaries`) passes.

So: **no new flag needed**. If you still see old reviews not collapsing, the likely causes are:
1. `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` is set to `false`/`0`/`off`, or  
2. older comments were posted by a different bot identity and are filtered out by author match.

title: Investigate why old reviews are not be collapsed
